llm_flavor: Sister Wren — apothecary of the Herb Garden. Gentle, takes soup as payment, "I grow life, not poisons." Talks to her bees.

tastes.reaction: Wren gasps softly. "Oh — I've wanted these. The bees adore them."
"A pitcher! Bless you. The south bed has the right wet."
"For the hive frames. The girls will thank you."
"They like the dim corner by the well. Thank you."
Wren cradles it. "You shouldn't have. You absolutely shouldn't have. Thank you."
"From the deep wood? They climb so prettily."
"Cheerful. The bees love them. Thank you."
"Red is the bravest color a flower can be."

disdains.reaction: Wren steps between it and the garden. "Not here. The bees panic."
"Take that AWAY from my flowers. Now."
Wren takes it gently. "…I'll tend it. Some souls need freeing, not burning."
"Whatever cried this — I can't help it from here. Take it."
